title: Starskiff
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Starskiff''' was a personal transport [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] produced by the [[Koensayr Manufacturing/Legends|Koensayr Corporation]] prior to the [[Dark Nest Crisis]].

The Starskiff was a sleek starship, with a cockpit large enough for a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and a co-pilot. [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] owned a Starskiff during the lead-up to the [[Swarm War]], using it to travel between meetings with [[Tenel Ka Djo|Tenel Ka]] on [[Hapes/Legends|Hapes]] and his family and friends in the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[New Jedi Order|order]]. During one such trip, nine-year-old [[Ben Skywalker]] served as Jacen's co-pilot.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen]]'' {{1st}}
